history.qwen_observation: Recipe validation failed because parameterized recipes were passed as colon-delimited strings instead of structured mappings with 'name' and parameter fields.
history.qwen_rationale: The OpenRewrite runner expects parameterized recipes to be expressed as objects with a 'name' key and explicit parameter keys (e.g., 'groupId', 'artifactId', 'newVersion'). Converting the lombok bump recipes to the correct mapping format will allow the recipe to validate and apply successfully, after which the Spring Boot 3.3 and Java 21 upgrade steps can proceed.
